message:
feat(raptorq): integrate G7 governance decision contract into decoder

Wire the decision_contract module into the runtime decoder policy path.
After choose_low_level_decoder_policy() selects an initial mode,
evaluate_governance() receives a GovernanceSnapshot of the decode state
and may override the decision: canary_hold downgrades BlockSchurLowRank
to HighSupportFirst, rollback forces ConservativeBaseline, and fallback
triggers a deterministic fallback. The governance output is captured in
DecodeStats as GovernanceTelemetry for forensic replay.

New fields: DecodeStats.governance (Option<GovernanceTelemetry>),
DecoderPolicyDecision.governance. Module declaration added to mod.rs.

New test g7_runtime_governance_output_populated_after_decode verifies
that governance telemetry is present after a successful decode, with
normalized posterior and contributor distributions. Updated
f6_deterministic_replay_across_decoders to assert governance telemetry
equality across deterministic replays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
